mapper.select: SELECT pm.id, pm.problem_id, p.problem_id AS display_problem_id, p.title AS problem_title, pm.initiator_uid, iu.username AS initiator_username, iu.nickname AS initiator_nickname, iu.avatar AS initiator_avatar, COALESCE(iur.pk_score, 0) AS initiator_pk_score, pm.opponent_uid, ou.username AS opponent_username, ou.nickname AS opponent_nickname, ou.avatar AS opponent_avatar, COALESCE(our.pk_score, 0) AS opponent_pk_score, pm.status, pm.winner_uid, wu.username AS winner_username, pm.initiator_submit_id, pm.opponent_submit_id, pm.start_time, pm.end_time, pm.surrender_uid, pm.gmt_create FROM pk_match pm INNER JOIN user_info iu ON iu.uuid = pm.initiator_uid INNER JOIN user_info ou ON ou.uuid = pm.opponent_uid INNER JOIN problem p ON p.id = pm.problem_id LEFT JOIN user_record iur ON iur.uid = pm.initiator_uid LEFT JOIN user_record our ON our.uid = pm.opponent_uid LEFT JOIN user_info wu ON wu.uuid = pm.winner_uid WHERE pm.id = #{id}

SELECT pm.id, pm.problem_id, p.problem_id AS display_problem_id, p.title AS problem_title, pm.initiator_uid, iu.username AS initiator_username, iu.nickname AS initiator_nickname, iu.avatar AS initiator_avatar, COALESCE(iur.pk_score, 0) AS initiator_pk_score, pm.opponent_uid, ou.username AS opponent_username, ou.nickname AS opponent_nickname, ou.avatar AS opponent_avatar, COALESCE(our.pk_score, 0) AS opponent_pk_score, pm.status, pm.winner_uid, wu.username AS winner_username, pm.initiator_submit_id, pm.opponent_submit_id, pm.start_time, pm.end_time, pm.surrender_uid, pm.gmt_create FROM pk_match pm INNER JOIN user_info iu ON iu.uuid = pm.initiator_uid INNER JOIN user_info ou ON ou.uuid = pm.opponent_uid INNER JOIN problem p ON p.id = pm.problem_id LEFT JOIN user_record iur ON iur.uid = pm.initiator_uid LEFT JOIN user_record our ON our.uid = pm.opponent_uid LEFT JOIN user_info wu ON wu.uuid = pm.winner_uid WHERE (pm.initiator_uid = #{uid} OR pm.opponent_uid = #{uid}) AND pm.status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT pm.id, pm.problem_id, p.problem_id AS display_problem_id, p.title AS problem_title, pm.initiator_uid, iu.username AS initiator_username, iu.nickname AS initiator_nickname, iu.avatar AS initiator_avatar, COALESCE(iur.pk_score, 0) AS initiator_pk_score, pm.opponent_uid, ou.username AS opponent_username, ou.nickname AS opponent_nickname, ou.avatar AS opponent_avatar, COALESCE(our.pk_score, 0) AS opponent_pk_score, pm.status, pm.winner_uid, wu.username AS winner_username, pm.initiator_submit_id, pm.opponent_submit_id, pm.start_time, pm.end_time, pm.surrender_uid, pm.gmt_create FROM pk_match pm INNER JOIN user_info iu ON iu.uuid = pm.initiator_uid INNER JOIN user_info ou ON ou.uuid = pm.opponent_uid INNER JOIN problem p ON p.id = pm.problem_id LEFT JOIN user_record iur ON iur.uid = pm.initiator_uid LEFT JOIN user_record our ON our.uid = pm.opponent_uid LEFT JOIN user_info wu ON wu.uuid = pm.winner_uid WHERE pm.opponent_uid = #{uid} AND pm.status = 0 AND pm.gmt_create > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) ORDER BY pm.gmt_create DESC

SELECT pm.id, pm.problem_id, p.problem_id AS display_problem_id, p.title AS problem_title, pm.initiator_uid, iu.username AS initiator_username, iu.nickname AS initiator_nickname, iu.avatar AS initiator_avatar, COALESCE(iur.pk_score, 0) AS initiator_pk_score, pm.opponent_uid, ou.username AS opponent_username, ou.nickname AS opponent_nickname, ou.avatar AS opponent_avatar, COALESCE(our.pk_score, 0) AS opponent_pk_score, pm.status, pm.winner_uid, wu.username AS winner_username, pm.initiator_submit_id, pm.opponent_submit_id, pm.start_time, pm.end_time, pm.surrender_uid, pm.gmt_create FROM pk_match pm INNER JOIN user_info iu ON iu.uuid = pm.initiator_uid INNER JOIN user_info ou ON ou.uuid = pm.opponent_uid INNER JOIN problem p ON p.id = pm.problem_id LEFT JOIN user_record iur ON iur.uid = pm.initiator_uid LEFT JOIN user_record our ON our.uid = pm.opponent_uid LEFT JOIN user_info wu ON wu.uuid = pm.winner_uid WHERE (pm.initiator_uid = #{uid} OR pm.opponent_uid = #{uid}) AND pm.status = 0 AND pm.gmt_create > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) ORDER BY pm.gmt_create DESC

SELECT pm.id, pm.problem_id, p.problem_id AS display_problem_id, p.title AS problem_title, pm.initiator_uid, iu.username AS initiator_username, iu.nickname AS initiator_nickname, iu.avatar AS initiator_avatar, COALESCE(iur.pk_score, 0) AS initiator_pk_score, pm.opponent_uid, ou.username AS opponent_username, ou.nickname AS opponent_nickname, ou.avatar AS opponent_avatar, COALESCE(our.pk_score, 0) AS opponent_pk_score, pm.status, pm.winner_uid, wu.username AS winner_username, pm.initiator_submit_id, pm.opponent_submit_id, pm.start_time, pm.end_time, pm.surrender_uid, pm.gmt_create FROM pk_match pm INNER JOIN user_info iu ON iu.uuid = pm.initiator_uid INNER JOIN user_info ou ON ou.uuid = pm.opponent_uid INNER JOIN problem p ON p.id = pm.problem_id LEFT JOIN user_record iur ON iur.uid = pm.initiator_uid LEFT JOIN user_record our ON our.uid = pm.opponent_uid LEFT JOIN user_info wu ON wu.uuid = pm.winner_uid WHERE (pm.initiator_uid = #{uid} OR pm.opponent_uid = #{uid}) AND pm.status IN (2, 3, 4, 5, 6) ORDER BY pm.gmt_create DESC
